title: transport.rs serde_json unwrap undocumented infallibility
description: transport.rs lines 110, 215, 439 call serde_json::to_string(&req).unwrap() with only a comment explaining infallibility. A future contributor adding a non-derived Serialize impl (e.g. a custom impl that can fail) will not see a compile error — they will ship a panic. The comment is correct but weak. Fix: use expect("JsonRpcRequest serialization is infallible for derived Serialize") so the assumption is in the panic message, not just a nearby comment. Alternatively, encode the contract with a type that only holds serializable types, but that is over-engineering.
